Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Don't be so stubborn! All you have to do is write his name on the list![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun was appointed to the student council by the president herself. He's a responsible person.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}That's why I didn't add him to the suspect list.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You know there are witnesses who've seen him wandering the streets late at night, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I thought you hated students who don't follow the rules.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's not that I doubt the witness reports.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It's more that I trust {f 4 1}-kun. So I'm not adding him to the list.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Odagiri... I really thought you were smarter than this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}You can go ahead and forget about our deal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}...If you'll excuse me, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 13 5 5 102}Maybe it sounded that way, but all I did was say how I really felt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That teacher suspects you of all people. How he ever got certified is a mystery to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Don't worry, {f 4 1}-kun. Even if the whole school turns on me, I'll have your back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Odagiri seems to care about me a lot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming better friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}"I'll have your back"... You're starting to rub off on me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Odagiri[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
